data.title: STOCKS | Coal India Shares Rise 3.3%, Leading NIFTY 50 Index
data.description: Coal India, a major player in the coal industry, saw its shares increase by 3.3%, making it the leading stock in the NIFTY 50 index. According to Jin10, this rise in stock price highlights the company's strong performance in the market. The NIFTY 50 index, which tracks the performance of 50 prominent companies listed on the National Stock Exchange of India, was positively impacted by Coal India's gains. This development reflects investor confidence in Coal India's operations and its potential for future growth.

data.title: CENTCOM Requests Additional Intelligence Personnel for Iran Operations
data.description: The U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) has requested the Pentagon to deploy more military intelligence personnel to its headquarters in Tampa, Florida, to support operations targeting Iran. According to Jin10, this deployment is expected to last at least 100 days, with the possibility of extending until September. The move underscores the ongoing focus on Iran within U.S. military strategy.

data.title: Ukraine's Use of U.S. Funds and Military Aid Discussed
data.description: The Long View, institutional investor, posted on X that Ukraine has received $100 billion in funds from the United States. The post suggests that without this financial and military support, Ukraine might not have been able to sustain its defense efforts. The discussion highlights the significant role of U.S. aid in Ukraine's ongoing conflict and its impact on the country's ability to resist external pressures.

data.title: Israeli President Herzog Clarifies War Objectives in the Middle East
data.description: Israeli President Isaac Herzog stated that the ongoing conflict is not aimed at changing Iran's regime but rather at transforming the Middle East. According to Jin10, Herzog emphasized the strategic goals of the war, focusing on regional stability and security. He highlighted the importance of addressing broader geopolitical challenges in the area. Herzog's remarks come amid heightened tensions and complex dynamics in the Middle East, where various nations are navigating alliances and conflicts. The president's statement seeks to clarify Israel's position and objectives in the current geopolitical landscape.

data.title: U.S. Energy Secretary Downplays Impact of Iran Conflict on Energy Markets
data.description: U.S. Energy Secretary Wright has stated that the impact of the Iran conflict on energy markets is temporary and a minor cost for achieving military objectives. According to Jin10, the recent airstrikes by the U.S. and Israel on Iran, followed by Tehran's response, have heightened regional tensions and disrupted shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. This disruption has affected the crucial oil and gas transport routes in the Middle East, leading to increased energy prices. Concerns over a prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz have caused a rise in Asian oil prices on Thursday. Wright emphasized that the situation is temporary, noting that global oil supplies are ample, reserves are abundant, and U.S. oil production has reached record highs. He assured that the U.S. Navy would soon escort tankers through the strait, which carries about one-fifth of the world's daily oil consumption.

data.title: India's Rupee Strengthens Following Central Bank Intervention
data.description: India's rupee saw significant gains on Thursday, marking the largest advance among Asian currencies. Bloomberg posted on X that this development comes after the central bank intervened to support the currency, which had reached a record low the previous day. The intervention highlights the central bank's commitment to stabilizing the rupee amidst ongoing economic challenges.

data.title: Sahara AI Unveils 2026 Strategic Roadmap for AI Evolution
data.description:
Sahara AI has officially announced its strategic roadmap for 2026. According to Odaily, the company aims to transition AI from conversational capabilities to autonomous execution through its investment agent Sorin and the locally deployed tool ClawApp, based on OpenClaw. The underlying architecture will incorporate long-term memory for agents, multi-agent collaboration networks, and protocol layer automatic settlement, creating a seamless on-chain value transfer loop.

Currently, Sahara AI serves over 40 leading institutions, including Microsoft, Amazon, and MIT, generating revenue in the tens of millions of dollars. By 2026, the company is committed to evolving AI from an assistant to autonomous productivity, enhancing life experiences while fostering a fair and open decentralized agentic economy.

data.title: Japan Raises Travel Warning Levels for UAE and Qatar
data.description: Japan has elevated its travel warning levels for the United Arab Emirates and Qatar, reflecting heightened caution for travelers. According to Jin10, this decision comes amid ongoing geopolitical tensions and regional uncertainties. The Japanese government advises citizens to exercise increased vigilance when visiting these countries, although specific reasons for the heightened warnings were not disclosed. Travelers are encouraged to stay informed about local developments and adhere to any safety guidelines issued by authorities.

data.title: SK Hynix Maintains Sufficient Helium Supply Amid Iran Crisis
data.description: SK Hynix has announced that it possesses an adequate inventory of helium, ensuring that the ongoing crisis in Iran will not impact its operations. According to Jin10, the company has taken measures to secure its supply chain against potential disruptions. The assurance comes amid concerns over the geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, which have raised questions about the stability of helium supplies. SK Hynix's proactive approach highlights its commitment to maintaining steady production and mitigating risks associated with external geopolitical factors.

data.title: STOCKS | India's Sensex Index Opens with Gains
data.description: India's Sensex index opened with a 0.5% increase, reaching 79,530.48 points. According to Jin10, this rise reflects positive market sentiment as investors react to recent economic developments. The Sensex, a key indicator of the Indian stock market, has shown resilience amid global economic uncertainties. Analysts suggest that this upward trend may continue if favorable conditions persist.

data.title: India Seeks to Alleviate Debt Burden with Strategic Measures
data.description: India is taking steps to manage its substantial debt obligations that are set to mature in the coming years. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the government's efforts to mitigate the financial strain from these liabilities. The strategy involves a combination of refinancing and extending the maturity of existing debts to ensure economic stability. This approach aims to reduce the immediate fiscal pressure and provide a more manageable timeline for debt repayment. The move is part of a broader plan to maintain fiscal health and support economic growth amid global financial uncertainties.

data.title: As of the end of last month, OpenAI's annualized revenue had exceeded $25 billion.
data.description: According to The Information: As of the end of last month, OpenAI's annualized revenue had exceeded $25 billion. (Jinshi)

data.title: The top-performing live trading account in the cryptocurrency market has a combined long position of $30.31 million in ETH and BTC.
data.description: Ai Yi posted on the X platform that the top-performing live trading account on Coin, "Old Devil," is currently long on ETH and BTC worth $30.31 million. ETH: 7500 ETH (10x leverage), worth $15.83 million, average entry price $2050.71, unrealized profit $462,000. BTC: 200 BTC (10x leverage), worth $14.48 million, average entry price $73,080, unrealized loss $122,000. Since December 20, 2024, the cumulative profit has reached $86.6 million, with a historical win rate of 50% and a total return of 3698%.

data.title: After an eight-month hiatus, a Bitcoin OG wallet deposited 500 BTC, worth $36.39 million, into Binance.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, a Bitcoin OG wallet (1QLASn) deposited 500 BTC, worth $36.39 million, into Binance two hours ago after an eight-month hiatus.

data.title: Market Transition: Indian Auto Dealers See Shift from Rebound to Stable Growth
data.description: The Federation of Automobile Dealers Associations (FADA) in India has observed a shift in the market dynamics over the next three months. According to Jin10, the market appears to be transitioning from a phase of strong rebound to a more stable growth trajectory. This change indicates a potential stabilization in the automotive sector, reflecting broader economic trends.

data.title: Thailand's March Inflation Expected to Be Affected by Middle East Conflict
data.description: Thailand's Ministry of Commerce has projected that the country's inflation rate for March will be influenced by ongoing conflicts in the Middle East. According to Jin10, the ministry highlighted concerns over potential disruptions in oil supply and rising energy prices, which could impact the cost of goods and services in Thailand. The situation is being closely monitored as authorities assess the broader economic implications. The ministry emphasized the importance of maintaining stability in the face of external pressures, while also considering measures to mitigate potential inflationary effects.

data.title: OpenAI's Annual Revenue Surpasses $25 Billion
data.description: OpenAI's annual revenue has exceeded $25 billion as of the end of last month. According to Jin10, this significant financial milestone highlights the company's rapid growth and increasing influence in the technology sector. OpenAI's advancements in artificial intelligence and machine learning have positioned it as a leader in the industry, driving substantial revenue growth. The company's success reflects the growing demand for AI solutions across various sectors, underscoring its pivotal role in shaping the future of technology.

data.title: Intel CEO Predicts Memory Shortage to Last Until 2028
data.description: Intel's CEO has announced that the ongoing memory shortage is anticipated to continue until 2028. According to NS3.AI, the increasing costs of storage have led to a slowdown in the demand for PC replacements. Furthermore, Japan's PC shipments are experiencing impacts due to these market limitations.

data.title: Zerohash joins surging list of crypto firms vying for a bank charter
data.description:
Several crypto companies have secured OCC conditional approval for a banking charter since the GENIUS Act was passed in July, including Circle, Ripple, Bridge and Stripe.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/zerohash-applies-us-national-bank-charter?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Expert Predicts Rapid Technological Shift in Mortgage Market
data.description: The Director of the U.S. Federal Housing Finance Agency, Pulte, has indicated that while the transformation is not yet fully realized, there is an impending recognition of technology's swift impact on the mortgage market. According to Jin10, Pulte emphasized the significant changes technology is bringing to the industry, suggesting that widespread acknowledgment of these advancements is imminent. The statement highlights the evolving landscape of mortgage financing, driven by technological innovations that are reshaping traditional processes and practices.
